description: HTTP status codes are extensible and grouped by first digit; unknown codes are handled by class semantics
Client believes server host key differs from known_hosts entry; could be rebuild, IP reuse, MITM, or DNS mistake
safe_fix: Verify host identity before replacing known_hosts entry

description: Authentication failed; cause can be wrong user/key, server disabled method, permissions, locked account, PAM/SSSD issue
safe_fix: Read-only log correlation before changing keys or sshd_config

description: SMB authentication failed; not necessarily filesystem permission error
FTP uses separate control and data channels; NAT/firewall commonly breaks data transfer while login works
safe_fix: Prefer SFTP; otherwise configure passive address and port range plus firewall rules

description: Local router may not own the public IPv4 address when behind CGNAT or double NAT
error_code_family: port forwarding configured but unreachable externally
safe_fix: Public IPv4, IPv6, reverse tunnel, or upstream NAT configuration
